title: Senior Plant Manager at Hindustan Unilever

jsonLd.title: Senior Plant Manager at Hindustan Unilever
jsonLd.description:
Hindustan Unilever has an exciting opening for a Plant Manager at our Gwalior office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Hindustan Unilever:
Hindustan Unilever is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in FMEA

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hindustan Unilever!
